title: move_to_pos_target command
description: Move to the current pixel position of a target entity (no pathfinding — straight movement).
markdownDescription: *Move* to the current pixel position of a *target* entity (straight movement, no pathfinding).

prefixItems.title: move_to_pos_target command
prefixItems.description: Move to the current pixel position of a target entity.
prefixItems.markdownDescription: *Move* to the current pixel position of a *target* entity.

prefixItems.title: move_to_pos_target command parameters
prefixItems.description: target (required), proximity_px (optional), max_time_s (optional), change_dir_ms (optional), dt_comp (optional), absolute (optional)

target.title: Target Entity
target.description: Entity ID, alias, or blackboard pointer whose position to move towards.
target.markdownDescription: *Entity ID*, alias, or *blackboard pointer* whose position to move towards.

proximity_px.title: Proximity in px
proximity_px.description: How close to come to the target position in pixels. Default is 10.
proximity_px.markdownDescription: How close to come to the target position in pixels. Default is `10`.

max_time_s.title: Maximum time (in sec) to reach the position
max_time_s.description: Maximum time in seconds to reach the position. After this time the movement stops.

change_dir_ms.title: Change Direction after ms
change_dir_ms.description: Keep the movement direction unchanged for this many ms before recalculating. Default is 1000.

dt_comp.title: Delta-time Compensation
dt_comp.description: Compensate movement for current framerate. Default is true.
dt_comp.markdownDescription: Compensate movement for current framerate. Default is `true`.

absolute.title: Ignore velocity
absolute.description: Move without applying entity velocity. Default is false.
absolute.markdownDescription: Move without applying entity velocity. Default is `false`.
